title: Uguubear's Sub Server Pack
description: This is the preferred modpack if you're playing on Uguubear's sub server.
body:
**This is the recommended modpack for [uguubear's](https://twitch.tv/uguubear) sub server. You can try playing without it but you'll likely run into issues. Join the discord to get whitelisted: https://discord.gg/uguubear**

This modpack mainly just consists of performance mods, QoL mods and Vivecraft. Keep Vivecraft installed even if you don't plan on playing in VR because it'll allow you to see the arms of VR players.

Notable in-game keybinds:\
Left Alt - Push-to-Talk\
M - Mute Microphone\
V - Proximity Voice Settings\
C / F6 - Zoom\
Z - Enlarge Minimap\
B - New Waypoint\
U - Waypoint Screen\
Y - Minimap Settings

For the full mod list, you can either click on the modpack on the left sidebar and all the mods will appear under dependencies or you can just check the in-game mod menu.

Mods that aren't on modrinth: \
Nature's Compass - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass \
No Fade - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-fade \
Xaero's Minimap - https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php
